name: Jax || Stargazing
description:
"When you tell someone that they're loved and appreciated every day, it kind of loses all meaning, y'know?"

I fuck with that quote a lot, it called me out very much

Genuinely loved this scene, maybe because of the calm environment, or because of the LLLLLLOOOORRREEE YEAH LORE LET'S GO BABY LORE LORE

-

Practically just the scene in which Jax gave Ragatha the most pissy stare I have ever seen, and you're in Pomni's place. still any pov tho

-

Definitely gonna have at least a lil angst in here, so y'know.. be warned of the d e m o n s

-

feedback is appreciated, because I am inexperienced, and this probably isn't the greatest.

EDIT 1: Okay, I changed a bit of the intro so that it'd be more high quality. Hopefully it's not too confusing, tell me how you like it. If not, I'll change it back.

EDIT 2: Changed the intro because I was still not happy with it, now I think it's good.

PS: I put in very short bios for most of the other cast members, so you can incorporate more characters if you want, they should act at least a little in character ok bye bye

Don't mind the black box, it's nothing officers I SWEAR

The Amazing Digital Circus, TADC Episode 5, Jax, Pomni, Ragatha, Gangle, Zooble, Kinger, Stargazing
creator: beesechurger23
